summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of SGMD P0 fixes. All 4 priority fixes verified working correctly: (1) Tags visible without hover, (2) Risk icon visible, (3) SuperSapiens logo with dark background, (4) 'Mudança Emergencial' label. All calendar view modes tested (semanal, mensal, semestral, anual). Create/view/delete flows working correctly.
passed_tests: P0 Fix 1: Natureza tags (Mudança Planejada, Mudança Emergencial) visible directly on calendar event badges - 13 tags found
P0 Fix 1: Categoria tags (Preventiva, Deploy) visible directly on calendar event badges - 22 tags found
P0 Fix 2: RISCO ALTO text badges visible on high-risk events - 13 badges found
P0 Fix 2: Risk icons with data-testid visible on high-risk events - 13 icons found
P0 Fix 3: SuperSapiens icons have dark background (bg-[#071D41]) - 12 icons verified
P0 Fix 3: SuperSapiens icons have ring border (ring-1 ring-white/60) - 12 icons verified
P0 Fix 4: 'Mudança Emergencial' label displays correctly in form dropdown
P0 Fix 4: 'Mudança Emergencial' label displays correctly on calendar tags
Weekly view shows additional details (status, responsavel, sistemas)
Date filtering works with datetime-local format (2026-04-08T10:00)
Create new high-risk change with emergencial natureza works
New event displays with all correct tags (Mudança Emergencial, Deploy, RISCO ALTO)
Login with admin@sgmd.gov.br / admin123 works correctly
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data including 'Deploy Critico Producao' event on Apr 8 2026
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified working. Calendar displays Natureza and Categoria tags directly on event badges without hover. High-risk events show red AlertTriangle icon in circle and 'RISCO ALTO' text badge. SuperSapiens logo has dark background for visibility. 'Mudança Emergencial' label displays correctly in forms and calendar. All calendar view modes (semanal, mensal, semestral, anual) working correctly.

tags_visible_without_hover.details: Natureza tags (12 'Mudança Planejada', 1 'Mudança Emergencial') and Categoria tags (12 'Preventiva', 10 'Deploy') visible directly on calendar event badges

risk_icon_visible.details: 13 'RISCO ALTO' text badges and 13 risk icons with data-testid found on high-risk events

supersapiens_logo_visibility.details: 12 SuperSapiens icons found with bg-[#071D41] dark background and ring-1 ring-white/60 border

mudanca_emergencial_label.details: 'Mudança Emergencial' (with cedilla) displays correctly in form dropdown and on calendar tags
